instruction: The cloud service system, cloudbed-1, experienced two failures within the time range of March 20, 2022, from 14:00 to 14:30. For each failure, the root cause component, the exact root cause occurrence time, and the underlying reason are currently unknown. You are tasked with identifying, for EACH failure, the root cause component, the root cause occurrence datetime, and the root cause reason.
groundtruth:
answer 1: component=shippingservice; reason=container CPU load; datetime=2022-03-20 14:23:15
answer 2: component=recommendationservice2-0; reason=container process termination; datetime=2022-03-20 14:14:46
scoring_points:
The 1-th root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2022-03-20 14:23:15
The 2-th root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2022-03-20 14:14:46
